notes: Tools supporting IT budgeting process measurement, governance, and cost tracking; report finds most organizations lack effective tools; best-in-class use continuous monitoring
Referenced as Priority 6 Enabler in PACE framework; IT process model for governance and control; evolved into COBIT 2019; foundational for IT governance practices
Service-level-based cost recovery identified as Priority 6 Capability; key recommendation for laggards and industry norm firms; links IT cost to business value through measurable SLAs
Identified as enabling best-in-class organizations to optimize scarce resources; requires IT involvement with enterprise strategy and business-centric service level measurements as prerequisites
Report analyzes outsourcing as cost management strategy; warns it may mask problems rather than solve them; J.P. Morgan Chase/IBM cited as cautionary example; cultural conflict noted as barrier (33%)
Referenced as data center consolidation technology option alongside utility computing; emerging in 2004; largely superseded by cloud computing and containerization
Referenced alongside grid computing as infrastructure efficiency approach; conceptual precursor to cloud computing pay-per-use models; superseded by IaaS/PaaS cloud services
Image consolidation technology; displacing multiple smaller machines and running workloads on partitions in a single larger machine; evolved into modern virtualization and containerization
Cognos identified as world leader in BI; supports management cycle from planning/budgeting to measuring/monitoring to reporting/analysis; evolved into modern analytics and AI-driven BI platforms
MAPICS solutions for manufacturing including extended ERP, CRM, and supply chain management; implemented on Microsoft and IBM platforms; 10000+ customer sites

FRx Software suite for budgeting, planning, consolidations, and financial reporting; rebranded as Microsoft Business Solutions for Analytics-FRx and Analytics-Forecaster; later superseded by Microsoft Dynamics

Four levels identified: footprint (physical location), image (partition multiple workloads on fewer machines), workload (aggregate workloads into fewer images), data/applications (reduce redundant instances); foundational for modern cloud migration strategies
